commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=116482962ddb0bc5aba80fe73e19806dfa224079)
commands.review_summary:
The PR makes `recommended` the default public skill ranking across browse, home feeds, and `/api/v1/skills`, adds digest ranking indexes/backfill support, adjusts search popularity scoring, and updates docs/tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection shows current main maps omitted v1 API sort to `updated`, while the PR maps it to `recommended`; the browse parser similarly changes missing sort to `recommended`. I did not run a local server because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A maintainer needs to choose the public API/UI default-compatibility path and rollout expectations before any automated repair would be safe.

target.title: Make recommended the default skill ranking
target.body:
## Summary

- makes `recommended` the canonical public skill sort across browse, home feeds, and `/api/v1/skills`
- keeps old `default` sort input as a compatibility alias
- ranks recommended results by stars, all-time installs, downloads, then updated time
- updates search popularity scoring so downloads are only a fallback signal
- adds digest index/backfill support, docs, and regression tests for ranking and sort-state behavior

## Tests

Passed on the rebased head:

- `git diff --check`
- `bun run format:check`
- `bun run lint`
- `VITE_CONVEX_URL=https://example.invalid bun run test -- src/__tests__/skills-index.test.tsx src/__tests__/skills-route-default-sort.test.ts src/__tests__/home-route.test.tsx convex/skills.listPublicPageV4.test.ts convex/skills.publicListCursor.test.ts convex/search.test.ts convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts convex/lib/skillSearchDigest.test.ts`
- `VITE_CONVEX_URL=https://example.invalid bun run test -- convex/maintenance.test.ts convex/skills.ownership.test.ts convex/skills.publicListCursor.test.ts`
- `bunx tsc -p packages/schema/tsconfig.json --noEmit`
- `bunx tsc -p packages/clawhub/tsconfig.json --noEmit`
- `bun run --cwd packages/clawhub-mod typecheck`
- `VITE_CONVEX_URL=https://example.invalid bun run build`

Attempted but blocked by an existing dependency issue:

- `VITE_CONVEX_URL=https://example.invalid bun run test` passed 230/232 test files and 2567/2567 tests, then failed two `scripts/public-corpus/*` suites because `scripts/public-corpus/dummyOwners.ts` imports missing `@faker-js/faker`.
- `bunx tsc --noEmit` fails for the same missing `@faker-js/faker` import in `scripts/public-corpus/dummyOwners.ts`.

## Prod-data preview

- Read `skillSearchDigest` from prod deployment `wry-manatee-359` using read-only CLI access.
- Built a local snapshot preview for the actual `/skills` page with the PR ranking formula.
- Verified `/skills?prodSnapshot=1` in Playwright; top rows were:
  1. `@pskoett/Self-Improving Agent`
  2. `@ivangdavila/Self-Improving + Proactive Agent`
  3. `@spclaudehome/Skill Vetter`
  4. `@steipete/Gog`
  5. `@halthelobster/Proactive Agent`

## Notes

- Convex prod export/import for a full cloned dev deployment is blocked by missing backup/export permission (`CreateBackups`).
- `convex logs --failure` is not supported by the installed Convex CLI.
- Local UI screenshots were captured for `/skills` mobile and desktop after confirming Recommended defaults and search switches to Relevance.
target.author: jesse-merhi

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
